_meta.note: Captured on darwin-arm64 via `npm run perf -- --spawn`. keystroke + transcript are clean medians. stream = a clean single-run capture; under --spawn the isolated backend may not connect, and its reconnect churn inflates frame-pacing, so re-capture stream on a backend-CONNECTED instance (perf:serve against a live profile, or attach) for tighter tolerances. Re-baseline with `npm run perf -- --update-baseline`.
